questions: what to do if someone is drowning
pani te dube gele ki kora uchit
how to save a drowning person
drowning er por ki korte hoy
drowning victim ke ki bhabe bachabo
answers: If someone is drowning, call for help immediately (dial 999). Throw a flotation device or rope to them — don't jump in unless you're a trained swimmer. Once rescued, check breathing and start CPR if needed.
Keu dube gele prothome 999 call korun. Rope ba floating kisu chure din. Nijey pani te jaben na jodi swimming na janen — nahole dujonei dubte paren. Tule ene breathing check korun.

For a drowning victim: get them out of water safely, lay them flat, check for breathing. If not breathing, begin CPR immediately — 30 chest compressions then 2 rescue breaths. Continue until help arrives.
Drowning er victim ke tule ene prothome breathing check korun. Breathing na thakle CPR shuru korun. Pani beriye ashle side e ghuriye din. Joto taratari ambulance call korben toto bhalo.
